description: Two adjacent events from the same session are swapped in events.jsonl line order. The events themselves are unchanged byte-for-byte; only their positions in the file differ.

modifications.mutation: Lines at the two indices (chosen at runtime) are swapped.
modifications.rationale: Documents V1 verifier behavior under same-session adjacent-event swap. Check 2 detects the file SHA mismatch; check 3 does NOT (V1 check 3 walks per-session chains via prev_event_hash links, not via file-line order).

expected_failures: check 2 (artifact integrity): events.jsonl bytes reordered; SHA-256 declared in manifest no longer matches.
notes: V1 verifier does NOT fail check 3 on this fixture — check 3 walks chains by prev_event_hash links which are unchanged by a file-line swap. A future verifier may tighten check 3 to enforce file-line ordering; this fixture would then need its results.json updated and the spec amendment that introduced the tightening.
